svg.text: • 141. Linked List Cycle — base detection (return bool)
• 142. Linked List Cycle II — detection + cycle entry (full Floyd)
• 876. Middle of the Linked List — slow is at midpoint when fast reaches the end
• 234. Palindrome Linked List — find middle, reverse second half, compare
• 143. Reorder List — find middle, reverse, interleave
• 19. Remove Nth From End — fast advances n first, then both walk together
• 160. Intersection of Two Linked Lists — pointer swap trick (related two-pointer)
• 202. Happy Number — iterate digit-square-sum until 1 (success) or cycle (failure)
• 287. Find the Duplicate Number — array as function f(i) = A[i]; duplicate is cycle entry
• 457. Circular Array Loop — direction-consistent cycle in modular array indexing
• Pollard's rho factorisation — Floyd's on f(x) = (x² + c) mod n in number theory
• PRNG cycle detection — same idea: detect period of a deterministic state machine
Recognition: any iterated function on finite state — Floyd's detects the period in O(period).
